residency_notes: CrofAI publicly states it does not store prompts or responses and processes conversations in real time only.
prompt_training_notes: CrofAI publicly states that prompts and responses are not stored and are not used for training AI models.
user_identifier_notes: AI Stats may send this provider a provider-facing pseudonymous user identifier when the upstream API supports it.
regional_pricing_notes: CrofAI publishes a single public rate card rather than separate regional endpoint pricing.
